title: Yukon Medley
description: A tangy and creamy Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring Yukon gold potatoes roasted with a blend of herbs and spices for a quick weeknight meal.

ingredients.name: Greek Yogurt or Greek Feta Cheese (for serving)

instructions: Peel the Yukon Gold Potatoes and cut them into bite-sized chunks. Rinse under cold water to remove any dirt.
In a large mixing bowl, toss the potatoes with olive oil until well coated. Add minced garlic, chopped herbs, red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper. Toss gently to combine evenly.
Spread the potato mixture in an even layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, tossing occasionally, until the potatoes are golden brown and tender.
Serve hot as is or drizzled with Greek yogurt or crumbled feta cheese if desired.
